introSection: Tornado is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Bakken in Klampenborg, Sjælland, Denmark. It opened in 2009.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The ride has spinning cars seating four riders in two rows of two facing each other.

fullText:
Tornado is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Bakken in Klampenborg, Sjælland, Denmark. It opened in 2009.



Orange track and black supports.

The ride has spinning cars seating four riders in two rows of two facing each other.
